originalTitle: Rose agrees to succeed Iraola at Bournemouth
originalDescription: Marco Rose agrees to take over at Bournemouth when manager Andoni Iraola leaves at the end of the season.

originalTitle: Rosenior feels '100%' support from Chelsea owners
originalDescription: Chelsea head coach Liam Rosenior says he feels "100%" support from the club's ownership despite a run of four league defeats without scoring.

originalTitle: 'Worst I've seen' - Leicester face relegation again
originalDescription: BBC Sport takes a look at what Leicester City need in their seemingly doomed fight for Championship survival.

originalTitle: Konate says he is close to signing new Liverpool deal
originalDescription: Ibrahima Konate says he is "close to an agreement" with Liverpool over a new contract and there is a "big chance" he will stay.

originalTitle: Lukaku holds positive clear-the-air talks with Napoli
originalDescription: Romelu Lukaku will continue his rehabilitation from injury in Belgium after holding clear-the-air talks with Napoli.

originalTitle: Should Gabriel have been sent off for Haaland clash?
originalDescription: Gabriel pushed his head towards Erling Haaland's face yet escaped with only a booking. Why did the VAR not intervene for a red card?

originalTitle: Redesigned ball could reduce heading impact - scientists
originalDescription: Scientists believe footballs could be designed to reduce the impact of heading after new research discovered the action caused a previously unreported pressure wave energy transfer to the brain.

originalTitle: 'By chance or choice, they have clicked' - why Man City will be champions
originalDescription: Match of the Day pundit Danny Murphy explains why he thinks Manchester City will beat Arsenal to the Premier League title.

originalTitle: West Ham aiming to move four points clear of Spurs at Palace LIVE!
FIA reveal F1 rule tweaks aimed at encouraging 'more flat-out driving'
originalDescription: Formula 1 bosses have confirmed a package of tweaks to the sport's 2026 regulations that is designed to appease driver concerns over their safety and certain elements of competition.

originalTitle: How 10 English teams could be in Europe next season - with six in Champions League
originalDescription: The Premier League can no longer have 11 teams competing in Europe next season, but there is still a way for 10 to be there.

originalTitle: Bournemouth appoint Rose as Iraola successor
originalDescription: Bournemouth have appointed Marco Rose as Andoni Iraola's successor.

originalTitle: The 10 factors that will decide the Premier League title race
originalDescription: They are now effectively neck-and-neck. And what a finale to this Premier League title race we have in store.

originalTitle: 'Booing, spitting, name calling' - Calzaghe looks back to the beginning
originalDescription: Joe Calzaghe, to many, is the greatest boxer these isles have produced. Retired unbeaten, a super-middleweight champion for over a decade and a man who stepped up in weight to beat two legends in the United States to cap things off.

originalTitle: Smart appointment? Why Rose is ideal replacement for Iraola
originalDescription: When Andoni Iraola was at Rayo Vallecano he was asked in an interview with Spanish sports outlet Relevo who he enjoyed watching. His reply feels particularly pertinent now. “Marco Rose's Gladbach was one of my favourite teams,” said Iraola.

originalTitle: Draper out of Madrid Open as Boulter draws Townsend in first round
originalDescription: The draws have been set for the Mutua Madrid Open, which begins on Tuesday live on Sky Sports.
